description_long: This warehouse complex consists of two main rectangular buildings separated by a central driveway, with landscaped green areas and trees interspersed around the perimeter. The structures feature flat and slightly sloped roofs, large window panels, and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality. The facades are primarily light gray with some brown accents, and the buildings are surrounded by paved surfaces for vehicle access and parking. The central driveway is lined with parked cars and leads to the entrances of both buildings, suggesting active use for storage and logistics. The exterior walls appear to be constructed from concrete or masonry, with metal and glass elements for windows and doors. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing accessibility and efficient use of space.
description: A pair of light gray, flat-roofed warehouse buildings with large windows, separated by a central driveway and surrounded by landscaped green areas and parking.
description_view_0: The view shows the front of the warehouse complex, with the main entrance and driveway visible between two rectangular buildings, and landscaped greenery in the foreground.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the length of the buildings, the central driveway with parked vehicles, and the arrangement of trees along the paved area.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back entrances, additional windows, and a continuation of the green landscaping, with the driveway extending out of sight.
description_view_3: This opposite side view displays the other end of the driveway, more parking spaces, and the side facades of both buildings with their simple, functional design.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features large, rectangular window panels set in a grid pattern, smooth concrete or masonry walls, and minimal decorative detailing. Entryways are wide and functional, with some brown accent panels and landscaped greenery providing subtle visual interest.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is primarily flat with some slight slopes, constructed from concrete or metal panels, and lacks visible skylights or rooftop equipment. The clean lines and absence of ornamentation reinforce the utilitarian character.
